languages.text:
After attacking with a ranged weapon, Eo-gann deals {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} Shock damage with 50% penetration damage to himself
While having concussion ranged weapon max range is reduced by -3.

While having concussion ranged weapon max range is reduced by -3.

languages.text:
After attacking with a ranged weapon, Eogunn suffers {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
While Eogunn is suffering from a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}, the maximum range of his ranged attacks is reduced by −3.

traits.locale_text:
After attacking with a ranged weapon, Eogunn suffers {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} shock damage with 50% armour penetration.
While Eogunn suffers {g|f:30820d5aef9b4251af7579722dc95307}concussion{/g}, the maximum range of his ranged attacks is reduced by −3.

languages.text:
После атаки дистанционным оружием Эоганн получает {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} с 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}.
Пока на Эоганна наложена {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}контузия{/g}, максимальная дальность его дистанционных атак снижается на −3.

languages.text:
Tras atacar con un arma a distancia, Eogunn sufre {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con 50 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}.
Mientras Eogunn sufre {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}conmoción{/g}, el alcance máximo de sus ataques a distancia se reduce en −3.

languages.text:
Nach einem Angriff mit einer Fernkampfwaffe erleidet Eogunn {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit 50 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}.
Ist Eogunn mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Erschütterungseffekt{/g} belegt, wird die maximale Reichweite seiner Fernkampfangriffe um −3 reduziert.

Ist Eogunn mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Erschütterungs{/g}effekt belegt, wird die maximale Reichweite seiner Fernkampfangriffe um −3 reduziert.

languages.text:
Après avoir attaqué avec une arme à distance, Eogunn subit {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec 50 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}.
Quand il souffre de {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Commotion cérébrale{/g}, la portée maximale de ses attaques à distance est réduite de 3.

languages.text:
Eogunn, menzilli bir silahla saldırdıktan sonra %50 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarına{/g} maruz kalır.
Eogunn bir {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}sarsıntıdan{/g} muzdaripken menzilli saldırılarının maksimum menzili 3 puan azalır.

languages.text:
伊奥贡使用远程武器进行攻击后，受到附带50%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。
伊奥贡处于{g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}震荡{/g}状态时，其远程攻击的最大射程减少3。

languages.text:
遠隔武器で攻撃した後、エオガンは{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を50%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}で受ける。
エオガンが{g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}脳震盪{/g}を受けている間、彼の遠隔攻撃の最大射程が−3減少する。
